title: English Dub Dream Cast
wikitext:
[]: Hypothetical Redub Casting             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Mar 04, 2015 6:51 pm Pick your own cast for a hypothetical redub of NGE. EASY MODE: Any actors from any medium, living or dead. HARD MODE: Living voice actors only. Grey DeLisle as Asuka Kira Buckland as Misato Maurice LaMarche as Gendo Ellen McLain as Ritsuko Tom Kenny as Kensuke I haven't thought of anyone for Toji or Kaji. I'm also stuck between three choices for Shinji: Justin Roiland, Dante Basco, and Michael Cera.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Mar 04, 2015 8:21 pm Koichi Yamadera's roles (like Kaji Ryoji and Spike Spiegel) should always be played by Steve Blum. It should be in their contracts or something. That is, unless they’re gonna go for broke and cast George Clooney.

[]: Re: Hypothetical Redub Casting             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 04, 2015 8:43 pm Tumbling Down wrote: EASY MODE: Any actors from any medium, living or dead.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionGodMode » Wed Mar 04, 2015 9:47 pm Troy baker as Kaji Ice Cube as Hyuga Kiefer Sutherland as Gendo Asuna voice from SAO for Asuka RDJ as Fuyutski Justin Bieber as Shinji Honestly I wouldn't change most of the dub VA. I would like to see the originals come back and redub their role though given the chance.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Wed Mar 04, 2015 11:59 pm One of the following: Everyone voiced in English by Jamaicans using Japanese honorifics. Everyone voiced by the VA cast of Alvin and the Chipmunks (animated series). Steve Oedekerk voicing everyone and re-writing the dialogue, just like he did in Kung Pow: Enter the Fist.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Mar 05, 2015 12:09 am I'd love to have the original Japanese cast record it all in proper Engrish.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Mar 05, 2015 5:28 am Gilbert Gottfried as Shinji. Fran Drescher as Misato. Matthew McConaughey as Rei. Mama June as Asuka Rob Schneider as Touji Jesse from "Breaking Bad" as Kensuke. Not the actor, just lines from the show. The entire crew of TMZ as Ritsuko Koichi Yamadera as Kaji. (His Engrish in Eva 2.0 is something) Groot as Fuyutusuki A Horny Bonobo Monkey as Maya The Ghost of Tupac as Hyuga The Ghost of Notorious B.I.G. as Aoba. And they're all performing in snooty French accents. That or just get the cast of the Bob's Burgers to do the show line for line but with a little bit of that Bob's Burgers feel. Tina as Shinji of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Mar 05, 2015 12:59 pm Rebuild!Ritsuko has a sexy voice so I think that lady would be best. Frank Welker as Rei, of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 05, 2015 7:20 pm Okay, fine. Angels... Frank Welker Aoba... Matt Frewer Asuka... Tara Strong Evas (misc)... Frank Welker Fuyutsuki... Jim Cummings Gendo... Keith David Hikari... Cree Summer Hyuga... Billy West JSSDF Guy... Jeff Bennett Kaji... Jonathan Frakes Kaworu... Rob Paulsen Kensuke... Thom Adcox-Hernandez Kiel... Ed Asner (if he weren't dead) Maya... Misato... Naoko... Tress MacNeille Pen Pen... Frank Welker Rei... Kath Soucie Ritsuko... Rachel Tichotin Seele/France... Mark Hamill Seele/Russia... Clancy Brown Seele/UK... Tim Curry Seele/US... Michael Dorn Shinji... Nancy Cartwright Toji... Cam Clarke Tokita... Maurice LaMarche Yui... Kath Soucie I'll try to fill in the remaining two blanks with something stupid later.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Mar 05, 2015 7:32 pm How about all the reading voices from Macs? They might nail down Rei perfectly, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Mar 05, 2015 7:51 pm Reichu wrote: Okay, fine. Angels... Frank Welker Aoba... Matt Frewer Asuka... Tara Strong Evas (misc)... Frank Welker Fuyutsuki... Jim Cummings Gendo... Keith David Hikari... Cree Summer Hyuga... Billy West JSSDF Guy... Jeff Bennett Kaji... Jonathan Frakes Kaworu... Rob Paulsen Kensuke... Thom Adcox-Hernandez Kiel... Ed Asner (if he weren't dead) Maya... Misato... Naoko... Tress MacNeille Pen Pen... Frank Welker Rei... Kath Soucie Ritsuko... Rachel Tichotin Seele/France... Mark Hamill Seele/Russia... Clancy Brown Seele/UK... Tim Curry Seele/US... Michael Dorn Shinji... Nancy Cartwright Toji... Cam Clarke Tokita... Maurice LaMarche Yui... Kath Soucie I'll try to fill in the remaining two blanks with something stupid later.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 05, 2015 8:33 pm Chuckman wrote: Switch out Keith David with Frakes and bring in Kevin Conroy for Kaji and I'm sold.

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Fri Mar 06, 2015 12:46 am Reichu wrote: Okay, fine. Angels... Frank Welker Aoba... Matt Frewer Asuka... Tara Strong Evas (misc)... Frank Welker Fuyutsuki... Jim Cummings Gendo... Keith David Hikari... Cree Summer Hyuga... Billy West JSSDF Guy... Jeff Bennett Kaji... Jonathan Frakes Kaworu... Rob Paulsen Kensuke... Thom Adcox-Hernandez Kiel... Ed Asner (if he weren't dead) Maya... Misato... Naoko... Tress MacNeille Pen Pen... Frank Welker Rei... Kath Soucie Ritsuko... Rachel Tichotin Seele/France... Mark Hamill Seele/Russia... Clancy Brown Seele/UK... Tim Curry Seele/US... Michael Dorn Shinji... Nancy Cartwright Toji... Cam Clarke Tokita... Maurice LaMarche Yui... Kath Soucie I'll try to fill in the remaining two blanks with something stupid later.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 07, 2015 2:20 am Tumbling Down wrote: Terrific list! And nice job making me check Asner's Wikipedia page.

[]:             Quote Post by Lu-Cuss » Sat Mar 07, 2015 2:32 am Danny Devito as Shinji and Steve Blum making noises for all of the sound effects. The rest of the cast has no dialogue.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Thu Mar 12, 2015 1:41 pm Gendo: David Kaye. (Yesss...) Kiel: Christopher Lee. Fuyutsuki: John Hurt. Shinji: Veronica Taylor. Asuka: Tania Gunadi. Rei: Emma Watson. Ritsuko: Venus Terzo. Misato: Susan Blu. Hikari: Tara Strong. That's all I can think of at the moment.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Thu Mar 12, 2015 1:54 pm Lu-Cuss wrote: Danny Devito as Shinji and Steve Blum making noises for all of the sound effects. The rest of the cast has no dialogue.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Mar 12, 2015 6:00 pm I'm going to think of an actually serious list for this and get back here with it. EDIT: On second thought, actually no. If this were actually going to be a thing, I'd rather not be distracted by name actors whom I already know. Just bring in really talented no-names and pick the best ones on that basis to generate the character around the voice, not the actor. That said though, I think the following would be OK choices if I had no idea who they were: Michael Cera as Shinji Chloe Moretz as Asuka Hugh Laurie as Gendo JLaw as Misato Ryan Reynolds as Kaji if we're not already going with Blum, who should Americanize every role Yamadera does by default.

[]:             Quote Post by heavytread » Mon Mar 23, 2015 8:09 pm Troy Baker as Toji Jim Ward as Aoba David Kaye or Steve Blum as Gendo Nolan North as Shinji That's all K can think of.

[]:             Quote Post by Chainsaw Owl » Fri Mar 27, 2015 9:24 am I have a great fondness for Scott Menville, the voice of Lloyd Irving from Tales of Symphonia, and Kevin from Mission Hill. I'd love to see him voice Shinji. I also think Melissa Fahn wouod make a good Asuka, largely due to her performance as Gaz in Invader Zim. Oh and Steven Blum as Kaji, while I'm at it.

Article: English Dub Dream Cast
 rather not be distracted by name actors whom I already know. Just bring in really talented no-names and pick the best ones on that basis to generate the character around the voice, not the actor. That said though, I think the following would be OK choices if I had no idea who they were: Michael Cera as Shinji Chloe Moretz as Asuka Hugh Laurie as Gendo JLaw as Misato Ryan Reynolds as Kaji if we're not already going with Blum, who should Americanize every role Yamadera does by default.

I'd love to see him voice Shinji. I also think Melissa Fahn wouod make a good Asuka, largely due to her performance as Gaz in Invader Zim. Oh and Steven Blum as Kaji, while I'm at it.
